  "findings": [
    "Unprotected trench depth of 5 feet or greater with workers inside",
    "Lack of cave-in protection system (sloping, shoring, or shielding)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Evacuate all workers from the trench immediately",
    "Stop all work inside the trench until protective systems are installed",
    "Install compliant cave-in protection (shoring, trench shield, or slope/bench) per OSHA standards"
  ],
  "rationale": "An unprotected trench 5 feet or deeper poses an immediate, life-threatening cave-in hazard to workers inside. OSHA 1926 Subpart P strictly requires protective systems at this depth.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.652(a)(1)"
  ]
